entry.title: Every Developer Tool You Need in One Bookmark — KappaKit
entry.summary: A practical guide to the essential encoding, hashing, and conversion tools every developer reaches for daily, and why a unified toolkit saves hours per week.

entry.title: JWT Tokens Demystified: Structure, Security, and Common Mistakes — KappaKit
entry.summary: A deep dive into JSON Web Tokens: how JWTs work, their three-part structure, security best practices, and the most common mistakes developers make.
